objective: Test an ordered, same-event SMC lineage rather than loose confluence: important H1/external liquidity -> first sweep and reclaim -> H1 displacement structure break -> fresh H1 FVG or OB -> delayed first parent revisit -> M5 MSS/displacement -> nested child FVG or OB -> child-CE limit entry -> structural stop -> nearest opposing unswept liquidity target.

causal_recognizers.h1_aggregation: session anchored: buckets 09:15,10:15,11:15,12:15,13:15,14:15; final bucket includes all bars through 15:25 and becomes available only after its last included M5 bar closes
causal_recognizers.atr: causal SMA14 true range, continuous across sessions
causal_recognizers.h1_swing: strict 2-left/2-right fractal, available only at close of the second right H1 bar; ties disqualify
causal_recognizers.important_h1_swing: excursion away from pivot through confirmation >= 0.75 H1 ATR at confirmation
causal_recognizers.external_liquidity: confirmed important H1 swing, prior-session high/low, or prior-completed-ISO-week high/low
causal_recognizers.sweep: first post-availability wick at least one tick beyond the exact level
causal_recognizers.reclaim: directional close back across exact level on sweep bar or within 3 later M5 bars
causal_recognizers.h1_structure_break: within 8 closed H1 bars of reclaim, directional close at least 0.05 H1 ATR through latest causally confirmed opposite H1 swing; body >=0.60 H1 ATR and close-location >=0.65
causal_recognizers.parent_fvg: directional H1 three-candle gap ending on the structure-break bar, gap >=0.10 H1 ATR
causal_recognizers.parent_ob: last opposite-color H1 candle from reclaim bucket through the bar before the structure break; full candle range; confirmed only by that same break
causal_recognizers.parent_freshness: first post-confirmation overlap only; any earlier overlap before the minimum delay rejects the parent; close beyond far edge invalidates; maximum search 90 M5 bars
causal_recognizers.m5_swing: strict 2-left/2-right fractal, available only after second right M5 bar
causal_recognizers.m5_mss: within 6 M5 bars after parent revisit, directional close >=0.05 M5 ATR through latest confirmed internal swing formed after parent confirmation; body >=0.80 M5 ATR and close-location >=0.70
causal_recognizers.child_fvg: directional three-candle M5 gap ending on MSS bar, gap >=0.10 M5 ATR and midpoint nested inside parent
causal_recognizers.child_ob: last opposite-color M5 candle from parent revisit through pre-MSS bar; full range and midpoint nested inside parent
causal_recognizers.entry: resting limit at child midpoint/CE from next bar, six-bar TTL, requires later bar range to cross the exact limit
causal_recognizers.target: nearest opposing causally available unswept external-liquidity level at entry
causal_recognizers.stop_child: child far edge plus 0.10 M5 ATR adverse buffer; minimum distance 0.25 M5 ATR; reject distance >4.0 M5 ATR
causal_recognizers.stop_sweep: root sweep extreme plus 0.10 M5 ATR adverse buffer; same min/max distance gates

hard_execution_assumptions.entry_fill: exact resting limit; no favorable price improvement
hard_execution_assumptions.same_bar_order: stop before target whenever both are reachable; on the fill bar any reachable stop is charged first
hard_execution_assumptions.gap_through_stop: fill at adverse bar open when open is beyond stop
hard_execution_assumptions.target_gap: fill at target, never grant favorable open improvement
hard_execution_assumptions.time_stop: last valid bar close of entry session; no overnight position

splits.time: first 60% of globally sorted sessions development; last 40% untouched chronological holdout
splits.symbol: crc32(symbol) mod 3 in {0,1} development; mod 3 == 2 untouched symbol holdout
splits.joint_holdout: late-time AND held-out-symbol; never used for policy selection

selection_rule: Using only development-time and development-symbol observations, select the highest mean net_R at 6 bps among policies with at least 80 development trades and positive mean net_R separately in both temporal-development halves and both development symbol folds. If none qualifies, freeze P0_PRIMARY and declare that no dev-feasible strategy exists; do not rescue it by inspecting holdout.
failure_rule: Any missing minimum sample is INCONCLUSIVE, not profitable. Any non-positive untouched holdout or lower confidence bound fails the profitable-strategy claim.
negative_controls: direction-flipped MFE/MAE on identical post-entry paths
parent type and child type ablations
optimistic target-first bound reported separately but never used as primary
